channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Europe Cannot Abandon Climate Alarmism
item.description: As America grows wealthier, Europe continues to pursue a climate approach that is not working.

item.title: Mark Carney Ended Ties With America, But Remains Nearby
item.description: Reality waits quietly while people perform their roles with artificial intensity.

item.title: AI Needs Electricity, But Washington Blocks Grid Expansion
item.description: Engineers are ready to build the future, but political leaders are not.

item.title: Universities Regret Their Decisions
item.description: Six years after California ended standardized testing, the outcomes are uniformly disastrous.
